caption: A man is recorded in a studio setting featuring dark, textured acoustic foam walls. He wears a grey t-shirt, a grey and white baseball cap with a circular logo, and large black over-ear headphones. Positioned in front of him is a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm, with the brand name "-Blue" visible on a piece of equipment. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and speaking into the microphone. His head is slightly tilted down, and his eyes appear closed or cast downward. In the initial stages, his arms are mostly out of view or resting. As the sequence progresses, he begins to gesture with his right hand, moving it forward and outward in a sweeping motion to emphasize his speech. The camera angle remains static, focusing on the man from the chest up against the backdrop of the sound-absorbing panels.
